hooks.prompt: A file was just written. Check the tool_input to see the file path. If the file path matches the pattern books/<bookname>/chapters/ch*.md for any <bookname> (a chapter file in any book), extract the book folder from the path and respond with: {"additionalContext": "CONTINUITY REMINDER: A chapter file was written. Ensure books/<bookname>/docs/continuity.md is updated for this chapter — either via the continuity-updater agent or manually."} (substitute the actual book name). If the file is NOT a chapter file under books/*/chapters/, respond with: {"additionalContext": ""}.

A file is about to be written. Check the tool_input file_path. If it matches the pattern books/<bookname>/docs/section_*_outline.md for any <bookname> (a section outline file in any book), check whether the file content contains 'Section status: authoritative' or similar authoritative marking. If it does, this is an authoritative section write. In that case, extract the book folder from the path, then check: does books/<bookname>/docs/15_beats.md exist? If it does, does its header contain 'Beat status: Stable' or 'Beat status: Locked'? If beats are NOT at least Stable (they are Exploratory or Provisional), respond with: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "deny", "permissionDecisionReason": "Beat status is not yet Stable. Authoritative section outlines require at least Stable beats. Mark the section as provisional, or run /stabilize-beats first."}}. For all other cases (not a section outline, section is provisional, or beats are stable/locked), respond with: {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "permissionDecision": "allow"}}.
